title: Just one Mass. college ranks among the nation’s best graduate schools, per U.S. News
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: MIT ranked No. 1 in the U.S. for graduate engineering programs, leading in six engineering specialties.
Massachusetts medical schools did not appear in the top tier for medical research or primary care.
Boston College's master's in nursing ranked highest in Massachusetts at 26th, despite most nursing programs slipping.

title: Suffolk DA Kevin Hayden appears to have a new primary challenger. She used to work in his office.
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Linda Champion, former Suffolk DA team member, filed papers for a potential run against DA Kevin Hayden.
Champion previously ran for Suffolk DA in 2018, finishing fifth in the Democratic primary.
Hayden faces scrutiny over charging a Boston police officer with manslaughter, amid his reelection campaign.

title: Malden cook goes viral for selling trendy Ilocos empanadas out of her apartment
author: Katelyn Umholtz
bullets: Malden Board of Health shut down Janz Van's apartment-based Ilocos empanada business due to zoning ordinance violations.
Van plans to raise at least $30,000 for a food truck to continue selling her empanadas across New England.
Pre-orders for Van's Ilocos empanadas will be available at MIXX360 nightclub starting in May after high demand.

title: Giannis Antetokounmpo paid high praise to Celtics’ coach Joe Mazzulla
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo praises Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla for fostering a strong team mentality amidst challenges.
Celtics excel despite losing top scorer Jayson Tatum for much of the season, currently second in the Eastern Conference.
Milwaukee Bucks miss playoffs, sparking speculation about Antetokounmpo's future despite his expressed commitment to stay.

title: Person seriously injured in fall at Firefighting Academy facility
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: A person suffered serious injuries in a fall at the Firefighting Academy facility in Stow on Tuesday morning.
Emergency crews responded to the incident around 9:05 a.m. and provided medical care at the scene.
Due to weather, air transport was unavailable; the injured person was transported by ground to UMass Memorial Medical Center.

title: TravelMag went on a seafood road trip in Maine and named these ‘can’t-miss’ restaurants. Which is your favorite?
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: TravelMag conducted a seafood road trip in Maine, highlighting several 'can't-miss' seafood restaurants along the coast.
The Clam Shack in Kennebunkport is acclaimed for its legendary fried clams, while Bagaduce Lunch in Penobscot is noted as a hidden gem.
The tour includes stops at Eventide Oyster Co., J’s Oyster in Portland, and McLoon’s Lobster Shack, among others.

title: Ex-Stoughton cop Matthew Farwell’s DNA was on strap used to strangle Sandra Birchmore, prosecutors say
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Matthew Farwell's DNA found on the strap used to strangle Sandra Birchmore, prosecutors allege in new court filings.
Farwell believed he fathered Birchmore's unborn child and allegedly killed her in 2021, thinking she was pregnant with his baby.
Prosecutors revealed text messages indicating Farwell's belief in his paternity, though DNA tests excluded him as the father.

title: A young mother rescued her 2-year-old son after their car crashed into a Vermont river
author: John Waller
bullets: A 26-year-old mother rescued her 2-year-old son after their car crashed into the Ottauquechee River in Vermont.
Hartford Fire Department responded to the incident near Quechee Main Street; mother and son were safely on the bank by ambulance arrival.
The pair, taken to Dartmouth Hitchcock Medical Center, showed no apparent serious injuries; crash cause under investigation.

title: All the places you can go on the Amtrak Downeaster
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: The Amtrak Downeaster operates from Boston's North Station to Brunswick, Maine, with 12 stops across Massachusetts, New Hampshire, and Maine.
Passengers enjoy amenities like free Wi-Fi, reclining seats, and onboard dining, while fares range from $3 to $38.
Pets and bicycles are allowed with a fee, and discounts are available for seniors with no promo code needed.

title: ‘Boston College is about to have a renaissance in basketball’: Dan Hurley’s take on Luke Murray
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Luke Murray, 41, is set to become Boston College's head basketball coach, succeeding Earl Grant.
Dan Hurley praised Murray, his former assistant at UConn, predicting a basketball renaissance at Boston College.
Murray, son of actor Bill Murray, has helped UConn win two national championships during his tenure.
